description: Use this API to disconnect a bus during dynamic simulations. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = dist_bus_trip(ibus)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of the bus to be disconnected. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: STRT or MSTR not successfully executed.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
